title: Globe Life Inc. (GL) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Mike Majors - Investor Relations Gary Coleman - Co-Chief Executive Officer Larry Hutchison - Co-Chief Executive Officer Frank Svoboda - Chief Financial Officer Matt Darden - Chief Strategy Officer Brian Mitchell - General Counsel Conference Call Participants Jimmy Bhullar - JPMorgan Wilma Burdis - Raymond James John Barnidge - Piper Sandler Erik Bass - Autonomous Research. Ryan Krueger - KBW Andrew Kligerman - Credit Suisse Tom Gallagher - Evercore Operator Hello and welcome to the Q3 2022 Globe Life Inc. Earnings Call.

title: GLOBE LIFE INC. ANNOUNCES THIRD QUARTER 2022 EARNINGS RELEASE AND CONFERENCE CALL
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Oct. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) will release Third Quarter 2022 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, October 26, 2022.  At that time a copy of the Company's Q3 - 2022 earnings press release and any other financial and statistical information about the quarter will be available on the Company's website at https://investors.globelifeinsurance.com/ under Financial Reports and Other Financial Information.

title: Globe Life Has Reached My Target Price But Remains Reasonably Valued
text: Globe Life Inc. has rallied 19% this year, and thus it has outperformed the broad market by an impressive margin, as the S&P 500 has declined 22% during this period. Nevertheless, Globe Life remains reasonably valued.

title: Globe Life: All Time High
text: 88% technical buy signals. 12 new highs and up 8.07% in the last month.
